action.reasoning: Observation: Best mean_r2 still 0.303 (iter11, select-on-val_r2_q, hidden=768/blocks=4/dropout=0.4) with r2_q=0.076 positive but low; recent Huber+mean_r2 selections give val_r2~0.526/r2_q~0.15 but test r2_q~-5k (mean_r2~-2k) due to test dist shift/outliers (R2 hypersensitive). Val maxabs: t-tend~23, q~3.06, rad/precip~3.09. Analysis: q-tendency is bottleneck; iter11 config (noise/weighted-MSE/small-output/clip_grad/select-on-r2_q) achieved positive test q-r2; Huber didn't improve generalization enough. ~28s/epoch allows ~15 epochs in remaining ~12min budget. Decision: Retrain exact best-like config (MSE weighted q=8, noise=0.1, WD=1e-3, lr=5e-4+cosine, epochs=15, select on r2_q), update predict clip to [-20,20] (covers val stats safely), set model defaults to new arch; run train.py then submit_eval on best.pt for potential new best >0.303.
